results.title: Meta invests more than US$9.1 billion to build first Canadian artificial intelligence data center in Alberta
results.description: Meta will invest US$9.1 billion to build its first Canadian AI data center in Alberta. The project includes a dedicated 932-megawatt natural gas power plant.

results.title: Atlanta Uber, Lyft drivers rally against Waymo expansion, ask city leaders for limits
results.description: Uber and Lyft drivers rallied in Atlanta, asking city leaders to slow Waymo's expansion, saying autonomous vehicles are cutting into their earnings.

results.title: Bowers & Wilkins Launches Flagship 707 Prestige Edition In Australia
results.description: Bowers & Wilkins has launched its new 707 Prestige Edition bookshelf loudspeaker in Australia, positioning it as the flagship compact model in the company’s 700 Series range. Priced at $3,199 a pair, the new model builds on the existing 707 S3 platform while borrowing selected components from the higher-end 705 S3 Signature. The two-way, vented-box...
